title: catapodium marinum
intro: Catapodium marinum, also known as dwarf cat's tail or sea cat's tail, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Catapodium marinum have been found to provide several health benefits, including relief from pain and inflammation, as well as antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Catapodium marinum, such as infusions and tinctures, are made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to treat various ailments.
